Good evening my X family 

First wave swapped out the branch.
Second wave will swap out the bank entirely.

With Revolut, Monzo, Chime, N26... we got apps rather than bank tellers.
Underneath? Same old rails, same delays, same power dynamics.

Enter the third wave.

No custodians.
No silent intermediaries.
No waiting for days for settlements.

 • Your balance, in your own wallet.
 •Native yields, not added features.
 •Cross-border transfers in seconds, not days.

This is not about crypto.
It is about programmable neo-finance.

As many are just getting a handle on v1…
Others are already well into v2.

Welcome to the next financial stack.
@useTria @MindoAI

kept.text:
📱💳 Boom de los neobancos en Colombia: banca 100 % digital en auge

Los neobancos siguen ganando terreno en el país con propuestas ágiles y sin oficinas físicas. Jugadores como Nu Bank (@nubank), Lulo Bank (@LuloBank)  y Ualá (@uala_co  lideran esta transformación, a la que pronto se sumará Revolut (@Revolut) 🚀

Su crecimiento se explica por beneficios claros: cero cuota de manejo, transferencias gratis y mejores tasas de ahorro, lo que podría llevar a que los depósitos en estos bancos crezcan hasta 10 veces hacia 2025 📈

Aunque son 100 % digitales, están vigilados por la Superintendencia Financiera de Colombia (@SFCsupervisor) y respaldados en muchos casos por Fondo de Garantías de Instituciones Financieras.

#Fintech #Colombia #Economía #Finanzas

kept.text:
𝐊𝐀𝐒𝐓 vs Every Other Neobank.
why should you choose kast over others?

It's 2026 and the neobank space is already crowded with top comapnies like Revolut, cryptodotcom, Wise, and so many other competitors in web3 that  promise access to global money. 

However most still force you to choose between yield, rewards, low fees, or true global access while 𝐊𝐀𝐒𝐓 offers all this at once.

@KASTxyz offers a unique stablecoin native global money app that lets anyone store, earn yield and spend stablecoins instantly anywhere like cash  with real US accounts without no US residency required.

beyond vague explanations, let's list what exactly makes Kast a better Neobank for your idle stablecoins⬇️

◈𝐑𝐞𝐚𝐥 𝐒𝐭𝐚𝐛𝐥𝐞𝐜𝐨𝐢𝐧 𝐘𝐢𝐞𝐥𝐝 𝐰𝐢𝐭𝐡 𝐟𝐥𝐞𝐱𝐢𝐛𝐥𝐞 𝐬𝐭𝐚𝐤𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐨𝐩𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐬.
Most apps don’t do much with your stablecoins. 𝐊𝐀𝐒𝐓 actually puts them to work with two simple options:
     •USD Prime Vault → ~3.3% APY, backed by U.S. Treasuries
     •Gauntlet Alpha Vault → up to ~7% APY, DeFi-based
No lockups. You can move your money anytime and it keeps earning even while you spend.

◈𝐑𝐞𝐚𝐥 𝐂𝐚𝐫𝐝𝐬 𝐓𝐡𝐚𝐭 𝐑𝐞𝐰𝐚𝐫𝐝 𝐘𝐨𝐮 𝐨𝐧 𝐄𝐯𝐞𝐫𝐲 𝐒𝐩𝐞𝐧𝐝
𝐊𝐀𝐒𝐓’s Visa cards give you flat cashback on everything without any hidden tricks. Rewards can go higher with staking and promos and you can use it anywhere with Apple/Google Pay and no spending caps.

Compare that to Revolut which gives around 0.1–1% and cryptodotcom with up to 5% but only with strict staking

◈𝐑𝐞𝐚𝐥 𝐆𝐥𝐨𝐛𝐚𝐥 𝐀𝐜𝐜𝐞𝐬𝐬
Wherever you live, 𝐊𝐀𝐒𝐓 gives you real US account and routing numbers from day one across + countries. 
You can receive, send and auto-convert to 18+ local currencies instantly making it a perfect option compared to others.

Lastly, In just 2 years of launch, 𝐊𝐀𝐒𝐓 is already accessible in over 150+ countries with 1M+ users and nearly $5 billion in annualized volume and is on track to achieve $100 million annual revenue this year. 
This shows how trusted 𝐊𝐀𝐒𝐓 is among freelancers, remote teams, and anyone tired of traditional banks rejecting international payments 

Choose 𝐊𝐀𝐒𝐓, Choose Freedom

𝘨𝘒𝘢𝘴𝘵!!!

quoted_tweet.text:
What's the point of holding USDC if you can't spend it easily?

Crypto users should not have to go through extra processes just to use the USDC in their wallet.

Introducing @KASTxyz, A platform to store, earn, move and spend stablecoins.

It’s an app where your stablecoins feel like a normal bank account.
✔ You can hold dollars there.
✔ You can send money globally.
✔ You can earn yield on your balance.
✔ You can get an instant virtual card or request a physical card.

On KAST, you get a real USD account in your name that allows you to receive direct bank transfers directly and not just crypto deposits.

You can also send to other users with just a username, move funds to bank accounts in other countries, or receive crypto and convert it straight into spendable USD.

KAST works in 170+ countries from day one and supports 18+ currencies with instant auto-conversion.

So instead of your stablecoins just sitting in your wallet, they become usable money that can be easily accessed.

Instead of juggling crypto apps, banking apps and payment apps separately, KAST just puts everything in one place.

KAST gives users ease and comfort all built on stablecoins.

If you use stablecoins often, this is what you’ve probably been missing. Head over to https://t.co/OncnsqgJbv to create your personal USD account
